creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John R from comment #0)
# grep pwgsession.class.php /usr/ports/www/piwigo/pkg-plist
%%WWWDIR%%/include/pwgsession.class.php

# tar -tvf piwigo-php83-15.3.0.pkg| grep pwgsession.class.php
-rw-r--r--  0 root   wheel     696 20 Dez. 11:07 /usr/local/www/piwigo/include/pwgsession.class.php

This is with my locally build package (poudriere).

How did you install piwigo, from the port or with a package? If via package: Where did you get it from? Can you do a list of the package? I have 3997 files in my package:
 # tar -tvf piwigo-php83-15.3.0.pkg| wc -l
    3997
